title: rubellia rubella
intro: Rubellia rubella, also known as the common mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the verbascum genus and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Rubellia rubella include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Rubellia rubella can be made into teas, infusions, salves, and ointments, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
